## What do you want audited?

- Marketplace or store type:
- Product category:
- Number of listings:
- Target market or country:

## Listing details

Please include public listing links or paste non-sensitive listing text.

- Product title:
- Main description or bullets:
- Sale price:
- Landed product cost:
- Shipping or fulfillment cost:
- Marketplace fee rate:
- Typical ad spend per order:
- Expected refund rate:

## Goal

What should the audit focus on?

- [ ] Improve title and bullets
- [ ] Check margin and break-even ad spend
- [ ] Find conversion risks
- [ ] Prepare launch checklist
- [ ] Customize this CLI for repeated audits

## Paid review note

For paid manual audits or template customization, use Ko-fi:

https://ko-fi.com/alan363

Do not post passwords, ad account access, marketplace credentials, customer data,
or private order data in this issue.
